summary: Comprehensive testing of BISD HUB social media app completed. Backend APIs show 100% success rate (35/35 tests passed). Frontend UI and integration testing shows 95%+ success with all major functionality working including WebSocket chat, feed tabs, post creation with visibility options, profile management, and all 3 staff panels with searchbars.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay intercepts clicks on send buttons in Global Chat and DM
ui_bugs.note: This is an Emergent preview environment issue, not an app bug. Buttons work with force=True or keyboard Enter

passed_tests: Login with ADMIN001/admin123 - redirects to main app
Login with MOD001/mod123 - moderator access works
Login with MGMT001/management123 - management access works
Main feed loads with all 4 feed tabs (Official, Public, Following, Friends)
Global Chat - WebSocket connects and shows 'Connected' status
Chat rooms sidebar shows: General, Boys Only, Girls Only, Class N/A, Section N/A
DM page shows conversation list with existing conversations
Create Post dialog opens with visibility selector (Public, Profile Only, Friends Only, Official)
Official post triggers confirmation popup before posting
Search bar on right side - real-time search when typing shows users and posts
Click user avatar/name in post navigates to their profile
User Profile page shows: banner, avatar, display name, badges, bio, followers/following/friends count
Edit Profile dialog allows: display name change, bio update, PFP upload, banner upload, privacy toggles
Settings page shows: dark mode toggle, privacy settings, friend requests, friends list
Dark mode toggle works (moon/sun icon in sidebar)
Admin Panel has searchbar in Users tab - filters users correctly
Admin Panel can view pending registrations
Moderation Panel has searchbar in Users section
Management Panel has searchbar in Users section
Navigation: Home, Global Chat, Messages, Profile, Settings all work
Like button works on posts (heart fills and count updates)
Login page has 'Check registration status' link
Login page has 'Register here' link
seed_data_creation: Test posts and DMs created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from the comprehensive refactor are working. Backend APIs are 100% functional. WebSocket chat is connected and working. All 3 staff panels (Admin, Moderation, Management) have searchbars. Feed tabs (Official, Public, Following, Friends) work correctly. Post visibility options (Public, Profile Only, Friends Only, Official) work with confirmation popup for official posts. Edit Profile dialog has all required fields including PFP and banner upload. Settings page has dark mode toggle, privacy settings, friend requests, and friends list. The only minor issue is the Emergent badge overlay intercepting button clicks in the preview environment, which is not an app bug.
